title: Product Listing & Add to Cart
content:
PS-001 — Product Listing & Add to Cart
Module: Product Listing
Tags: regression, smoke
Priority: High
    
Description:
Verify that a user can view the product list, sort products, and add items to the cart after logging into the application.
Acceptance Criteria:
User should be able to login to the application (URL) with valid credentials.
User should be redirected to the inventory (product listing) page.
User should be able to view all available products on the page.
User should be able to see product name, price, description, and image.
User should be able to click "Add to Cart" button for a product.
User should be able to see cart icon updated with item count.
User should be able to click "Remove" button to remove product from cart.
User should be able to click on a product and navigate to product detail page.
User should be able to navigate back to product listing page.
    
Test Data:
url: https://www.saucedemo.com/
username: standard_user
password: secret_sauce
sortOption: Price (Low to High)
productName: Sauce Labs Backpack
